claims.evidence_text: The protein content of wheat may range from 7 to 22%, but mostly lies between 10 and 15% (53).
claims.claim_summary: Wheat grain protein content ranges from 7 to 22%, most commonly 10-15%.

claims.evidence_text: The protein content of wheat may range from 7 to 22%, but mostly lies between 10 and 15% (53).
claims.claim_summary: Typical wheat grain protein content is 10-15%.

claims.evidence_text: Dry (moisture content <12.5%), cool (<10°C), and pest-free storage of wheat grains protects against crop failure by providing a buffer to ensure nutrition security worldwide.
claims.claim_summary: Wheat grains should be stored at a moisture content below 12.5% (with cool temperature) to protect against spoilage.
